Source inputs:

# Legion Event Contracts

Events are immutable facts. They describe what happened in the workflow control plane and do not carry transport details, runtime provider handles, or imperative execution instructions.

## Ordering

Consumers order events within an aggregate by `generation` and then `sequence`. `generation` advances when an aggregate is rebuilt or invalidated. `sequence` is append-only inside that generation. `correlationId` groups one user-visible operation, while `causationId` points to the prior event that caused a follow-on fact.

## Duplicate Handling

Delivery is at-least-once. Consumers must recognize duplicates by `id`; side-effect related facts also carry `idempotencyKey` so dispatchers can collapse logically repeated effects. Replay must rebuild projections only and must not spawn workers, call models, create commits, post comments, deploy, or repeat effects.

## Catalog

| Event type | Aggregate | Fact |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project.created.v1` | `project` | Project workflow root was created. |
| `change.proposed.v1` | `change` | Change intent was proposed. |
| `artifact_revision.recorded.v1` | `change` | Versioned artifact revision was recorded. |
| `task.created.v1` | `task` | Task was created from a contract revision. |
| `task.linked.v1` | `task` | Task relationship was recorded. |
| `task.claimed.v1` | `task` | Task claim was recorded with its run. |
| `task.heartbeat_recorded.v1` | `task` | Task run heartbeat fact was recorded. |
| `task.blocked.v1` | `task` | Task blocker was recorded. |
| `task.retry_scheduled.v1` | `task` | Retry schedule was recorded. |
| `task.completed.v1` | `task` | Task completion fact was recorded. |
| `task.invalidated.v1` | `task` | Task invalidation fact was recorded. |
| `run.created.v1` | `run` | Run attempt was created. |
| `run.started.v1` | `run` | Run attempt start was recorded. |
| `run.finished.v1` | `run` | Run terminal state was recorded. |
| `input.recorded.v1` | `run` | External input fact was recorded. |
| `approval.requested.v1` | `approval` | Approval request was recorded. |
| `approval.granted.v1` | `approval` | Approval grant was recorded. |
| `approval.denied.v1` | `approval` | Approval denial was recorded. |
| `evidence.collected.v1` | `evidence` | Evidence collection fact was recorded. |
| `review.submitted.v1` | `review` | Review submission fact was recorded. |
| `integration.outbox_intent_recorded.v1` | `run` | Outbox side-effect intent was recorded. |
| `integration.effect_succeeded.v1` | `run` | Side effect success was recorded. |
| `integration.effect_failed.v1` | `run` | Side effect failure was recorded. |
| `release.requested.v1` | `release` | Release request was recorded. |
| `release.deployed.v1` | `release` | Release deployment was recorded. |
| `release.rolled_back.v1` | `release` | Release rollback was recorded. |
| `observation.recorded.v1` | `observation` | Post-release observation was recorded. |
| `migration.applied.v1` | `project` | Protocol migration application was recorded. |
